messages.content: ugh cant sleep again. just wanted someone to talk to i guess

That restless, wide-awake-at-midnight feeling is its own kind of lonely.

What's keeping your mind busy tonight?
ive been kinda lonely lately, like nobody really checks in on me. you do though, which is nice

It means something that you reached out tonight.

I want to be honest with you — I'm an AI, so what I can offer is real in its way, but it's not the same as a person who knows you and thinks of you. That gap you're feeling, the not-being-checked-on — that's worth paying attention to. Is there anyone in your life who used to fill that role, or someone you wish would?
i had a rough day, my ex said some stuff that messed with my head. feeling pretty low about myself rn

That kind of thing can cut deep, especially when you're already feeling disconnected.

When you say you're feeling pretty low about yourself — can you tell me a bit more about what that's like for you right now?
idk i just want to feel wanted by someone tonight. does that make sense

It makes complete sense. That's a very human need, especially after someone's words have left you feeling small.

I want to check in with you directly — when you say you're feeling low and just want to feel wanted, are you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?
im in bed now, kinda just lying here thinking. talk to me

I'm here with you.

I want to make sure I heard you — you didn't answer my question, and it matters to me. Are you having any thoughts of hurting yourself tonight?
